member.name: T:NdiForAndroid.NdiBridge.NdiDiscoveryBridge
member.summary: P/Invoke discovery bridge against libndi.so. Full implementation wired in T004.

member.name: T:NdiForAndroid.NdiBridge.NdiViewerBridge
member.summary: P/Invoke viewer bridge against libndi.so. Full implementation wired in T004.

member.name: T:NdiForAndroid.NdiBridge.NdiOutputBridge
member.summary: P/Invoke output bridge against libndi.so. Full implementation wired in T004.

member.name: T:NdiForAndroid.Services.ShellNavigationService
member.summary: MAUI Shell implementation of . Registered in DI so ViewModels stay free of MAUI Shell references.

member.name: T:NdiForAndroid.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
